commands.review_summary:
This PR normalizes `sessions_spawn` model overrides, gates `streamTo` to ACP runtime, reuses the same model normalization in `session_status`, adds focused regression coverage, and adds a changelog entry.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level. Current main forwards `model: "default"` as a non-empty override and model selection checks overrides before fallback defaults; the linked report also provides concrete `sessions_spawn` payloads and observed errors.
